description: Comprehensive NVIDIA GPU monitoring via DCGM exporter. Tuned for GTX 1080 Ti + RTX 3090 multi-GPU homelab.

panels.description: Rate of PCIe replays. Non-zero = link instability. Critical for the 1080 Ti riser troubleshooting.
panels.title: PCIe Replay Rate (link errors) - 1080 Ti canary

panels.description: Rate of microseconds spent throttled due to power cap.
panels.title: Power Throttling

panels.description: Rate of microseconds spent throttled due to thermal cap.
panels.title: Thermal Throttling

panels.description: Sync boost, board limit, low util, and reliability violations (rate).
panels.title: Other Violations (combined)

panels.description: Max XID code observed in the selected window per GPU. Non-zero indicates a hardware/driver event has occurred.
panels.title: Max XID in window

panels.description: Total energy consumed per GPU, converted from millijoules to kWh.
panels.title: Total Energy Consumed (kWh, cumulative)

title: GPU Metrics (DCGM)
